series_metadata.series_title: CONSENT AGREEMENTS AND PIIP MONITORING RECORDS
series_metadata.series_description: Records monitoring a nurse's compliance with the requirements imposed by the Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until the Board takes action releasing monitored party from Board requirements, or until Board action is taken based upon the monitored party's non-compliance, or until monitoring has not been active for five (5) years, unless needed for legal and/or administrative reasons. ; Paper: Retain until the Board takes action releasing monitored party from Board requirements, or until Board action is taken based upon the monitored party's non-compliance, or until monitoring has not been active for five (5) years, unless needed for legal and/or administrative reasons., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
